documentation.description: The location and information of an AIS vessel

record_types.name: Ais_Vessel

fields.name: Mmsi
fields.description: Mobile Marine Service Identifier, 9 decimal digits

fields.name: Turn_Rate
fields.description:
Units: [ddeg/s]
Turn rate, 0.1 degrees per second

fields.name: Dimension_Bow
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Distance from lat/lon location to bow

fields.name: Dimension_Stern
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Distance from lat/lon location to stern

fields.name: Dimension_Port
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Distance from lat/lon location to port side

fields.name: Dimension_Starboard
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Distance from lat/lon location to starboard side

fields.name: Tslc
fields.description:
Units: [s]
Time since last communication in seconds

fields.name: Flags
fields.description: Bitmask to indicate various statuses including valid data fields
